scoring-export-sql.source:
-- Standalone scorecard SQL generated by Cardre.

WITH woe_cte AS (
    SELECT
        *,
    CASE
        WHEN credit_amount IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN credit_amount <= 1087.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 1087.5 AND credit_amount <= 1275.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 1275.0 AND credit_amount <= 1412.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 1412.5 AND credit_amount <= 1500.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 1500.0 AND credit_amount <= 1625.0 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN credit_amount > 1625.0 AND credit_amount <= 1800.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 1800.0 AND credit_amount <= 1912.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 1912.5 AND credit_amount <= 2050.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2050.0 AND credit_amount <= 2250.0 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN credit_amount > 2250.0 AND credit_amount <= 2375.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2375.0 AND credit_amount <= 2462.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 2462.5 AND credit_amount <= 2550.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2550.0 AND credit_amount <= 2675.0 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN credit_amount > 2675.0 AND credit_amount <= 2825.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2825.0 AND credit_amount <= 2937.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 2937.5 AND credit_amount <= 3100.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 3100.0 AND credit_amount <= 3187.5 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN credit_amount > 3187.5 AND credit_amount <= 3325.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 3325.0 AND credit_amount <= 3537.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 3537.5 THEN -0.693147
        ELSE NULL
    END AS woe_credit_amount,
    CASE
        WHEN age_years IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN age_years <= 25.75 THEN -2.05293
        WHEN age_years > 25.75 AND age_years <= 26.5 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 26.5 AND age_years <= 27.5 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 27.5 AND age_years <= 29.0 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 29.0 AND age_years <= 31.75 THEN -1.542105
        WHEN age_years > 31.75 AND age_years <= 32.5 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 32.5 AND age_years <= 33.25 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 33.25 AND age_years <= 35.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN age_years > 35.0 AND age_years <= 36.0 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 36.0 AND age_years <= 37.5 THEN -1.542105
        WHEN age_years > 37.5 AND age_years <= 38.25 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 38.25 AND age_years <= 40.0 THEN -1.386294
        WHEN age_years > 40.0 AND age_years <= 43.0 THEN -1.386294
        WHEN age_years > 43.0 AND age_years <= 44.0 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 44.0 AND age_years <= 46.0 THEN -1.542105
        WHEN age_years > 46.0 AND age_years <= 50.0 THEN 0.65512
        WHEN age_years > 50.0 AND age_years <= 51.5 THEN 1.165945
        WHEN age_years > 51.5 AND age_years <= 52.25 THEN -2.05293
        WHEN age_years > 52.25 THEN 1.165945
        ELSE NULL
    END AS woe_age_years,
    CASE
        WHEN duration_months IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN duration_months <= 6.75 THEN -2.044756
        WHEN duration_months > 6.75 AND duration_months <= 7.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 7.5 AND duration_months <= 8.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 8.5 AND duration_months <= 11.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 11.0 AND duration_months <= 12.75 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN duration_months > 12.75 AND duration_months <= 13.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 13.5 AND duration_months <= 14.25 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 14.25 AND duration_months <= 15.0 THEN -2.044756
        WHEN duration_months > 15.0 AND duration_months <= 16.75 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN duration_months > 16.75 AND duration_months <= 18.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 18.5 AND duration_months <= 19.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 19.5 AND duration_months <= 23.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 23.0 AND duration_months <= 24.75 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN duration_months > 24.75 AND duration_months <= 26.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 26.5 AND duration_months <= 27.25 THEN -2.044756
        WHEN duration_months > 27.25 AND duration_months <= 32.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 32.0 AND duration_months <= 33.75 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN duration_months > 33.75 AND duration_months <= 35.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN duration_months > 35.5 AND duration_months <= 37.25 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 37.25 THEN 1.17412
        ELSE NULL
    END AS woe_duration_months
    FROM input_data
)
SELECT
    *,
    487.122876 + (-1.0 * 28.853901 * (-1.839395 + -0.244505 * woe_credit_amount + -1.13086 * woe_age_years + -1.413205 * woe_duration_months)) AS score
FROM woe_cte
